subcodes.first_line: The hosts of God, they are indeed the triumphant ones. These hosts, in their foremost station and highest rank, have ever been and shall remain the verses of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جند الله هم الغالبون این جند در مقام اول و رتبه اولی آیات الله بوده و هست
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Hands of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
